shape: three-sided attach: 3 orphan cards -> eldrazi cohort, narrative-arc batch

accepted.archetype_slot: Drone-tier as Titan-extended limb (cohort typology paragraph)
citations: Scryfall: BFZ-136 flavor_text 'Emrakul has not been seen in months. Though her brood's numbers have dwindled in her absence, each drone is still a deadly threat.'
cohort body: BFZ-block typology paragraph + Drone-tier definition
accepted.bullet_summary: Drone-tier brood member; BFZ flavor names Emrakul precisely while she remains withheld from the block, building dread through her named absence; Titan saved for EMN reveal

accepted.archetype_slot: Brood-corruption as Eldritch Moon's mechanical signature (cohort EMN paragraph); precedent tier for the MH3 brood-corruption-of-existing-subtypes mini-cohort
citations: Wizards.com: 'Over the Moon, Part 2,' 2016-07-04 (Rosewater on emerge mechanic + Innistrad-fauna corruption)
cohort body: Eldritch Moon corruption-arc paragraph + Emerge as canonical Eldrazi-corruption mechanic
accepted.bullet_summary: Eldrazi Crab via Emerge; EMN's signature corruption-of-Innistrad-native-fauna; wide-shot composition renders Emrakul's arrival as moment-already-passed

accepted.archetype_slot: MH3 brood-corruption-of-existing-subtypes mini-cohort (cohort MH3 paragraph) - extends mini-cohort from 4 to 5 prints
citations: Scryfall: MH3-3 flavor_text 'When Emrakul arrived on Innistrad, even fossils answered her twisted call.'
Scryfall: MH3-3 oracle_text Vigilance + Eldrazi Spawn token + Cycling {2}{U}
Scryfall: t:eldrazi t:trilobite returns 1 result (only Eldrazi Trilobite in MTG corpus)
cohort body: MH3 brood-corruption-of-existing-subtypes mini-cohort paragraph (prior 4 prints: Twisted Riddlekeeper, Hope-Ender Coatl, Snapping Voidcraw, Wumpus Aberration)
accepted.bullet_summary: Only Eldrazi Trilobite in MTG corpus per Scryfall; extends MH3 mini-cohort from 4 to 5 prints (Sphinx, Snake, Turtle, Beast, Trilobite); flavor anchors brood-corruption at the most-extreme-tier (ancient fossils answering Emrakul's call from Nephalia's reef)

cohort_body_updates: ## Appears on auto-gen block: added 3 wikilinks
Body roster: added 3 entries after Immobilizer Eldrazi, before '## The functional ideology' section

Caveats paragraph: body roster counter twenty -> twenty-three; updated coverage statement to BFZ/OGW/EMN/MH3 (Vexing Scuttler is corpus's first EMN anchor); Emrakul-Innistrad-arc traversal documented as narrative complement to BFZ-block Drone-Ingest -> Processor-consumption design loop; MH3 brood-corruption-of-existing-subtypes mini-cohort extended from 4 to 5 prints (Sphinx, Snake, Turtle, Beast, Trilobite)

Titans-sub-node caveat: updated Emrakul flavor-text-citation count (Horrific Assault + Vestige of Emrakul + Drownyard Lurker = 3 cards), noted Kozilek flavor-text + name citation (Kozilek's Sentinel), threshold for emrakul/kozilek sub-node remains below the bar
wikilink_discipline: Each card's ## Connections bullet contains EXACTLY ONE wikilink [[eldrazi]] per bbl-wikilink-scope-shift wave-195 rule; all other refs (eldritch-moon, over-the-moon-part-2) are in backticks; no hub wikilinks, no card-to-card wikilinks, no sibling-cohort wikilinks introduced at the card layer
anti_confab_check: All bullets quote verbatim flavor_text from Scryfall frontmatter (never invented); all type_line claims (Eldrazi Drone, Eldrazi Crab, Eldrazi Trilobite) are present in card frontmatter; Scryfall t:eldrazi t:trilobite=1 claim was sourced from trivia-pass research; cohort body archetype slots cited are present verbatim in cohort body (Drone-tier typology paragraph, EMN brood-corruption paragraph, MH3 brood-corruption-of-existing-subtypes mini-cohort paragraph)
